name: Synapse
description: Powered by a bio-chemical reaction, the Infested Synapse rifle fries its targets with a steady stream of <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive energy.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Powered by a bio-chemical reaction, the Infested Synapse rifle fries its targets with a steady stream of <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive energy.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes:
Synapse damage reduced from 19 to 18 in Conclave.
Synapse magazine capacity reduced from 30 to 25 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the Synapse beam to better represent it’s Corrosive Damage.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.changes: We have made changes to the way Criticals work on weapons that have been modded to have a crit chance greater than 100%. You may recall the existence of ‘red crits’ from many updates ago, which occurred with no clear formula other than “Synapse!”. Here is some clarity into the new system:

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: increased the ratings on the Synapse, Heavy Caliber, and Toxin Damage mods.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Changed logic that determines visual representation of damage mods on continuous-fire weapons (eg: Synapse, Ignis, etc).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.3.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed in-game stats for weapons that fire continuously (Flux, Synapse etc). Made fire-rate mods actually increase damage output and ammo consumption rate for these weapons (not only is this intuitively what you would expect it's important to maintain the balance for corrupted mods like Critical Delay).
